refs.description: CPython's standard-library Queue class, a thread-safe FIFO queue built on collections.deque with condition variables for blocking get/put.
JDK's ArrayBlockingQueue: a bounded FIFO queue backed by a circular array with put/take blocking semantics.
Celery's worker consumer pulls tasks off the broker queue for execution.
Redis list type backs LPUSH/RPOP queue patterns used for job and message queues.
